questionsList.questionContent: Who was the author of the Book of Acts?
To whom was the Book of Acts addressed?
Who was chosen to replace Judas Iscariot as an apostle?
On which Jewish festival did the Holy Spirit descend upon the disciples in Jerusalem?
Which prophet did Peter quote in his sermon on the Day of Pentecost?
What was the name of the gate where Peter and John healed a man lame from birth?
Who were the husband and wife who died after lying to the Holy Spirit about their property sale?
Who was the first martyr of the early church described in Acts?
Who preached to the Ethiopian eunuch on the road to Gaza?
In which city was Saul blinded by a light from heaven?
Who was the Roman centurion in Caesarea to whom Peter was sent by a vision?
In which city were the disciples first called 'Christians'?
Which apostle was executed by Herod Agrippa I?
Who accompanied Paul on his first missionary journey?
Who was the woman at Joppa whom Peter raised from the dead?
Who was the sorcerer Paul blinded in Cyprus?
At the Council of Jerusalem, who presided and gave the final decree concerning Gentile converts?
In which city did Paul and Silas singing in prison cause an earthquake?
Who was the woman in Philippi who sold purple cloth and became a believer?
In which city did Paul preach to the philosophers on the Areopagus?
Which couple worked as tent-makers with Paul in Corinth?
Who was the eloquent Jew from Alexandria who was corrected by Aquila and Priscilla?
In which city was there a riot caused by the silversmith Demetrius?
Who was the young man who fell asleep and died during Paul's long sermon in Troas?
Who was the prophet who predicted the famine and later that Paul would be bound in Jerusalem?
Who was the Roman governor of Judea who kept Paul in prison at Caesarea for two years?
Before which King did Paul make his defense in Caesarea, leading the King to say 'Almost thou persuadest me'?
On which island was Paul shipwrecked while being taken to Rome?
Who was the chief man of the island of Malta whose father Paul healed?
How many days did Paul spend in the house of Judas in Damascus before Ananias arrived?
What was the name of the man who sold a field and brought the money to the apostles' feet?
What was the name of the woman servant who came to the door when Peter was released from prison?
Who was the 'proconsul' of Cyprus who became a believer after seeing Elymas blinded?
In which city were Paul and Barnabas worshiped as Zeus and Hermes?
Who was the 'disciple' Paul found in Lystra, whose mother was a Jewess and father a Greek?
What was the name of the Roman commander who wrote a letter to Felix about Paul?
How many men joined Saul in Damascus before his conversion? (Wait: Acts 22:9 mentions they saw light but heard no voice). How many men accompanied Paul to Rome?),.
Who was the silversmith of Ephesus who made silver shrines for the goddess Artemis?
Which daughter of the King became a believer?) (Wait: no king's daughter named). Which of the four daughters of Philip the evangelist were prophetesses?
How many days was Paul at sea before the shipwreck began to look certain?
What happened to King Herod Agrippa I after he accepted the worship of the people of Tyre and Sidon?

answersList.value: He was struck by an angel and eaten by worms

questionsList.questionContent: Who was the high priest who came down to Caesarea to accuse Paul before Felix?
What did Paul use to escape from Damascus?),.
In which city was Peter when he saw the vision of the great sheet descending from heaven?

answersList.value: Joppa (at the home of Simon the Tanner)

questionsList.questionContent: Who was the lawyer (orator) who informed the governor against Paul in Caesarea?
How many believers were gathered in the upper room after Jesus' ascension?
Who was the 'crippled man' at the gate named 'Beautiful'?
Who was the man who offered the apostles money to receive the power of the Holy Spirit?
In which book of the OT was the Ethiopian eunuch reading?),.
What did Paul and Barnabas call each other in Lystra?.
Who was the 'beloved' person who was the first convert in Asia?), (Epaenetus, Rom 16, but Acts mentions...?). Let's ask about the Bereans.

answersList.value: They were more noble than those in Thessalonica

questionsList.questionContent: Which city did Paul say was 'full of idols'?
Which governor said 'Paul, you are out of your mind! Your great learning is driving you mad'?
How many years did Paul spend in Corinth during his second journey?
Who was the person that brought Paul to the apostles in Jerusalem for the first time?
Which island's governor was Publius?
To whom did Paul say 'Sirs, what must I do to be saved'?).
In which city did Paul have a vision of a man from Macedonia?
Who was the High Priest that ordered Paul to be struck on the mouth?
Who was the son of Paul's sister who informed the commander of a plot to kill Paul?
How many thousand people were baptized on the Day of Pentecost?
In which city did Paul spend two whole years in his own hired house?
Which prophet did Paul quote at the very end of Acts to the Jews in Rome?
How many days did Paul's shipwreck voyage take before they struck land?
Which group in the Sanhedrin did not believe in the resurrection, leading to a dispute between Paul and them?
Who was the 'chosen vessel' according to the Lord's word to Ananias?
How many deacons were originally chosen to serve tables?),.
Which city did Paul say was 'full of superstition'?),.
Who was the centurion who protected Paul on the ship during the storm?
What was the name of the place where Paul was bitten by a viper but suffered no harm?
How many thousand people were added after Peter's first sermon?), (Repeated?). Let's ask: How many thousand were added after the healing of the lame man?
Who was the daughter of the King?), (Still no). Who was the wife of Felix the governor?
Who was the 'chosen men' sent to Antioch with Paul and Barnabas after the Council?),.
What was the name of the goddess whose 'image fell down from heaven' according to the city clerk of Ephesus?
Who was the proconsul of Achaia who refused to judge Paul in Corinth?
What was the name of the girl who had a spirit of divination in Philippi?
In which city did Paul say he had 'fought according to the custom of the people'?), (No). In which city did the residents believe Paul and Barnabas were gods?
How many times did Peter see the vision of the sheet?),.
What was Paul's Roman name?), (Still Saul/Paul mentioned, but...). What were the citizens of Rome called?), (Wait: citizenship). What did Paul use to prevent himself from being flogged in Jerusalem?
Who was the 'orator' or 'lawyer' who accused Paul?).
What was the name of the man who Paul said was 'my son in the faith'?),.
In which city did Paul find an 'altar to an unknown god'?
How long was Paul's longest stay recorded in Acts?),.
Who did Paul say was 'not many wise, not many mighty'?), (Repeated?). Let's ask: Who was the 'beloved physician' traveler?
How many days did Paul wait in Troas before preaching and the accident happened?
Which book of the NT is the only 'History' book?
Who was the 'chosen man' who accompanied Paul on his second journey after the split with Barnabas?
Who did Paul say was 'my helper in Christ'?),.
On which journey did Paul visit Athens?),.
What was the name of the 'great wind' that caused the shipwreck?),.
How many days did the Holy Spirit tell them to wait in Jerusalem?),.
Which book of the OT was the 'last' quoted by Paul in Acts?),.
Who was the 'first' person Paul baptized in Europe?),.
In which city did Paul and Barnabas shake off the dust from their feet?
Who was the 'head' of the church in Jerusalem according to Paul's visit in Acts 21?
How many thousand Jews believed according to James?),.
Who was the 'Egyptian' mentioned by the commander who led 4,000 assassins into the wilderness?
Who was the 'young man' at whose feet the witnesses laid their cloaks during Stephen's stoning?
Which city was the home of Timothy?
Who wrote the Book of Acts?
